name: acapella_extract
description: Suede Labs acapella extraction service for remixers, DJs, mashup producers, vocal editors, sample-pack creators, karaoke teams, lyric transcribers, music supervisors, and agents building vocal-centric AI music pipelines. Returns a clean, isolated vocal stem from any source recording, optimized for low bleed and high intelligibility. Distinct from the 2-track or 4-track stems services: this is the dedicated vocals-only delivery with extra post-processing for vocal clarity. Supports acapella mashup production, vocal sampling for new tracks, lyric transcription preprocessing, vocal performance archival, isolated-vocal sync delivery, AI vocal model training data, and paid x402/ACP agent commerce workflows. Input is a public audio URL plus optional output format; output is a single vocal stem URL plus duration and detected key metadata.

audio_url.description: Public HTTP(S) URL of the source audio file. Supports mp3, wav, flac, m4a, and ogg up to 15 minutes long.

output_format.description: Audio format for the returned acapella. Use wav or flac for production work, mp3 for fast previews.

denoise.description: When true, applies additional noise and bleed reduction to the isolated vocal. Set to false to preserve raw extraction artifacts for archival use.
